rankings.name: Lossiemouth
key_risks: Short price leaves no room for error
Faces deepest field of male rivals to date

rankings.name: The New Lion
key_positive_factors: Excellent response to pressure in recent win
High cruising speed suited to Champion Hurdle pace
key_risks: Recent fall (F) suggests slight jumping frailty at speed

rankings.name: Brighterdaysahead
key_positive_factors: Stays further, ensuring strong finish up the hill
key_risks: Lacks the raw tactical speed of Lossiemouth
Frequently finds one too good at the top level

rankings.name: Golden Ace
key_positive_factors: Course winner with proven Festival temperament
key_risks: Official rating ceiling may be lower than principles

rankings.name: Anzadam
key_positive_factors: Highest Official Rating in the field (157)
Mullins second-string status often hides true potential
key_risks: Amateur jockey in a tactical G1
Recent form lacks the spark of a Champion Hurdler

rankings.name: Poniros
key_positive_factors: Unexposed with plenty of room for improvement
Solid place form in warm races
key_risks: Massive step up in class and intensity
Lacks the experience for a high-octane 2m start

rankings.name: Alexei
key_positive_factors: Galloping track like Cheltenham suits style
key_risks: Time-figures suggest he's a notch below Grade 1 level
Pace fit: might get outpaced early

rankings.name: Tutti Quanti
key_risks: OR 151 leaves him with 6lb+ to find on the favorites

rankings.name: Workahead
key_positive_factors: Capable of picking up pieces if others falter
key_risks: Best form is significantly slower than required here

mordin.favorite_bias: Model is over-trusting the market favorite (Lossiemouth) with a positive divergence of 3.64%.
